records.generated_code:
<script>
  const counterView = document.createElement('view');
  counterView.style.display = 'flex';
  counterView.style.alignItems = 'center';

  const decrementButton = document.createElement('button');
  decrementButton.textContent = '-1';
  decrementButton.style.margin = '0 10px';
  counterView.appendChild(decrementButton);

  const counterText = document.createElement('text');
  counterText.textContent = '0';
  counterView.appendChild(counterText);

  const incrementButton = document.createElement('button');
  incrementButton.textContent = '+1';
  incrementButton.style.margin = '0 10px';
  counterView.appendChild(incrementButton);

  let count = 0;

  decrementButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
    count--;
    counterText.textContent = count.toString();
  });

  incrementButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
    count++;
    counterText.textContent = count.toString();
  });

  document.body.appendChild(counterView);

  __flush__();
</script>
records.visual_rationale: preview is HTML, not an image — wire puppeteer in a future US to enable M4

records.generated_code:
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const switchContainer = document.createElement('view');
  switchContainer.style.width = '60px';
  switchContainer.style.height = '30px';
  switchContainer.style.borderRadius = '15px';
  switchContainer.style.border = '2px solid #ccc';
  switchContainer.style.display = 'flex';
  switchContainer.style.alignItems = 'center';
  switchContainer.style.cursor = 'pointer';
  switchContainer.style.backgroundColor = '#ccc';

  const toggleCircle = document.createElement('view');
  toggleCircle.style.width = '26px';
  toggleCircle.style.height = '26px';
  toggleCircle.style.borderRadius = '50%';
  toggleCircle.style.backgroundColor = '#fff';
  toggleCircle.style.marginLeft = '2px';
  toggleCircle.style.transition = 'margin-left 0.2s';

  switchContainer.appendChild(toggleCircle);

  switchContainer.addEventListener('click', function() {
    toggleCircle.classList.toggle('active');

    if (toggleCircle.classList.contains('active')) {
      toggleCircle.style.marginLeft = '32px';
      switchContainer.style.backgroundColor = '#4caf50';
    } else {
      toggleCircle.style.marginLeft = '2px';
      switchContainer.style.backgroundColor = '#ccc';
    }
  });

  document.body.appendChild(switchContainer);
  __flush__();
});
</script>
records.error_log: runtime ran without throwing but counters were creates=2 appends=1 flushes=0 — make sure to call __flush__() at the end and to actually create and append elements via document.createElement + appendChild.
